title: Salty Silky Festive Malaysian Turkey Mince Stir-fry
description: A festive twist on a classic dish featuring turkey mince, flavored with spices for a savory and silky texture, suitable for vegans.

ingredients.name: Turkey Mince
ingredients.notes: Use plant-based turkey mince or soy mince for a vegan-friendly option.

instructions: Preheat oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Dust the turkey mince with all-purpose flour and toss to coat evenly. Add salt and pepper, and stir-fry until golden brown, about 4 minutes.

Add minced garlic and chopped onion to the pan, stirring for another minute. Incorporate grated carrots and sliced peppers, continuing to stir-fry until vegetables are tender but not mushy, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in chicken broth and thyme sprigs. Cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Serve hot with steamed rice or naan bread.
